case_title: WILLIAM ANDERSON VS. PG&E CORPORATION, ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-26-2019 CONTINUED TO JUL-01-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS REPORT RE: BANKRUPTCY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASS TORT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, WILLIAM ANDERSON, FAYE ANDREWS, SHIRLEY ARNEY, LINDA ARNEY, DAVID ***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT*** AS TO DEFENDANT PG&E CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOES 1-50. INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-26-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-03-2019 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE
